query:
ALTER TABLE trialSignups 
MODIFY COLUMN email varchar(320) NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS segment ENUM('Kids 3-5', 'Kids 6-12', 'Teens', 'Adults', 'Not sure') AFTER program,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS goal ENUM('Confidence', 'Discipline', 'Fitness', 'Self-defense', 'Bullying help', 'Weight loss') AFTER segment,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS preferredDays ENUM('Weekdays', 'Weekends', 'Either') AFTER goal,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS scheduledTime timestamp NULL AFTER preferredDays;
